question: Which income group accounts for the largest share in the final year shown?

options.A: Cannot determine which income group is largest without a legend to explain what each color represents.
options.B: The orange segment (middle income) has the largest share.
options.C: The red segment (upper-middle income) has the largest share.
options.D: The green segment (low income) has the largest share.

explanation: The chart displays different colored segments but provides no legend to identify which color corresponds to which category. Without a legend it is impossible to determine which specific category has the largest share; options that assign a category to a color are guessing.
